title: Custom Hooligan BMX Radical Rick 1:24 Figure
published_title: Not supplied in the accessible source bundle
summary: A Lititz BMX unboxing and first-examination record for a custom 1:24-scale Radical Rick figure. The supplied packaging image credits Hooligan BMX for the figure, Damian X. Fulton for Radical Rick, John Stancliff / Gap Hill Speed Shop for the painted bicycle and scene, and Lititz BMX as the preserving project.
historical_significance: Documents a contemporary fan-made interpretation of Radical Rick and the collaboration among BMX artists, builders, collectors, and the Lititz BMX preservation project.
transcript_status: No transcript was supplied for this recording.
rights: All rights reserved unless separately documented; see docs/rights-and-access.md.
notes: The source image is preserved unchanged.
The exact platform title, duration, publication date, and individual canonical URL were not present in the accessible build bundle.
